CustomField.description: This field stores the email id of the agency user and this field will be used for back-end purposes and pass the email id to portal when the user accepts the assignment instead of its name
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field stores the email id of the agency user and this field will be used for back-end purposes and pass the email id to portal when the user accepts the assignment instead of its name
CustomField.label: Assigned To Agency User Email
